description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style rifle with a matte black finish, featuring a collapsible stock and a detachable box magazine. The upper and lower receivers are constructed from metal, likely aluminum alloy, with a polymer pistol grip and stock for reduced weight and improved ergonomics. The rifle is equipped with a quad-rail handguard for accessory mounting, and a set of iron sights is visible on the top rail. The barrel is of standard length and capped with a flash hider at the muzzle. The overall design is modular, allowing for customization with various attachments, making it suitable for urban environments and close-quarters scenarios.
description: A matte black tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, detachable box magazine, quad-rail handguard, and iron sights, designed for modularity and urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, collapsible stock, pistol grip, quad-rail handguard, and detachable magazine.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the barrel, flash hider, and narrow profile of the handguard and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the magazine and stock details.
description_view_3: Rear-on view focusing on the buttstock and alignment of the upper receiver and barrel.
